title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at WelcomHeritage - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at WelcomHeritage - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, WelcomHeritage in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About WelcomHeritage:
WelcomHeritage is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WelcomHeritage!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
